scripts.lint: biome lint package.json backend/package.json biome.json knip.json
scripts.format:check: biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false package.json backend/package.json biome.json knip.json
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run deadcode && npm run shellcheck
scripts.verify:pr: npm run quality && npm --prefix backend run verify:pr
